evals.prompt: mam nagranie /absolute/path/to/vista-auth-review.mov gdzie gadam po polsku o bugach w desktop auth. chce z tego normalny ScreenScribe review z sensownym output dir, a na koncu powiedz mi gdzie lezy report json i markdown
evals.expected_output: The skill should choose the ScreenScribe review workflow, prefer the direct CLI command `screenscribe review <file>` for a normal user-facing run, and report the output directory plus the JSON/Markdown artifact paths.

evals.prompt: mam video z demo ale nie chce AI review. chce transcript, timestampy, audio i bundle dla agenta. zrob to po screenscribowemu
evals.expected_output: The skill should choose the transcript-first `screenscribe preprocess <file>` workflow, not full review, and report the output bundle directory plus the expected transcript artifacts.

evals.prompt: w repo https://github.com/VetCoders/Screenscribe cos popsulismy w html pro. nie chce zgadywania - sprawdz jak teraz odpala sie analyze/review i napraw to po repoowemu, z gateami
evals.expected_output: The skill should treat this as repo work inside ScreenScribe, prefer the currently open checkout when available, otherwise refer to the canonical GitHub repo, use repo-native commands and quality gates, and avoid treating it like a plain video-analysis task.

evals.prompt: mam trzy movki ze sprint review i zalezy mi na tym, zeby AI pamietalo kontekst miedzy nimi. nie potrzebuje pelnej wizji, szybciej bedzie lepiej. zrob workflow pod ScreenScribe
evals.expected_output: The skill should recognize batch review with shared context, prefer the direct multi-video `screenscribe review ...` command, and choose a faster mode such as no-vision when appropriate.
